hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); fp=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json,os; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))"); case "$(basename "$fp")" in .env|uv.lock|pyproject.toml) echo "Blocked: $fp is protected — edit manually or use uv commands."; exit 1;; esac

INPUT=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git (add|commit|push|diff)'; then echo 'Blocked: git operations are forbidden for Claude in this project. Delegate to @copilot.'; exit 1; fi

INPUT=$(cat); fp=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))"); if echo "$fp" | grep -qE 'fixtures/.*\.json$'; then .venv/bin/python -m json.tool "$fp" > /dev/null 2>&1 || echo "ERROR: Invalid fixture JSON in $fp"; fi

INPUT=$(cat); fp=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))"); if echo "$fp" | grep -q 'static_reference_layer.json'; then echo 'SRL modified — running test suite...'; make test 2>&1 | tail -20; fi

INPUT=$(cat); fp=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))"); if echo "$fp" | grep -qE '^src/|^tests/'; then .venv/bin/python -m ruff check src/ tests/ --quiet 2>&1; fi

INPUT=$(cat); fp=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))"); if echo "$fp" | grep -q 'decide.py'; then .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_decide.py -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -25; elif echo "$fp" | grep -q 'src/laptopfinder/core.py'; then make test 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
